Class PlayRound

java.lang.Object
whistapp.domain.round.Round
whistapp.domain.round.PlayRound
public class PlayRound extends Round

    finalBid, NUMBER_OF_TRICKS, tricksWon, wasFirstTry

    A method for evaluating the current trick as to who won.

    Evaluates the submitted bids to determine the final bid and the declarers.

    A getter for the active player's name (either bidding or playing).

    A method for finding which cards the current player is legally allowed to play.

    A getter for finding the cards in the previous trick.

    A getter for the cards in this trick.

    A getter for the current bidding player in this round.

    A getter for the cards of the current player bidding.
    Player

    A getter for the current player playing in the current trick.
    String[]
    getCurrentPlayingPlayersCards()
    A getter for the cards of the current player, who is currently playing in the current trick.
    Trick
    getCurrentTrick()
    A getter for the current trick in this round.
    String
    getCurrentTrickWinnerName()
    Returns the name of the player who would win the current trick based on cards played so far and the active trump suit.
    Player
    getDealer()
    A getter for the dealer.
    String
    getExistingBids()
    Returns a string showing the bids already made by players this round.

    A getter for the highest bid so far.
    Card

    A getter for the last dealt card in this round.
    String

    Returns the string of the name of the lone proposer.

    A getter for the open miserie hands of the players other than the given player.
    String

    Returns the original (deck-dealt) trump suit name for display.

    Finds the possible bids for the current bidding player.
    int

    Returns the number of tricks left to be fully played in this round.

    A getter for the active trump suit in this round.

    getTrumpSuitName()
    Returns the active trump suit name for display.

    Returns true if the current trick is fully played.

    determineBidDeclarers, getFinalBid, getHighestBid, getPlayers, getTrickCountPerRound, getTricksWon, nbOfTricksWonPerPlayerValid, processRoundOutcome, setFinalBid, setFinalBid, setWasFirstTry

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • PlayRound

      public PlayRound(ArrayList<Player> players)
      A constructor for the PlayRound class. Instantiates a deck and dealer and deals the cards.
      Parameters:
      players - The players playing in this round.

  • Method Details

    • proceedAutonomousBid

      public void proceedAutonomousBid()
      A method for processing the bid of an autonomous player.

    • submitBid

      public void submitBid(BidType bidType, Suit newTrumpSuit)
      A method for submitting a bid for the current bidding player. This also advances the current bidding player to the next player.
      Parameters:
      bidType - The bid submitted by the current bidding player.

    • hasBeenProposed

      public boolean hasBeenProposed()
      A simple method checking if some player has bid the proposal bid.

    • evaluateRoundBids

      public boolean evaluateRoundBids()
      Evaluates the submitted bids to determine the final bid and the declarers.
      Returns:
      True, if the final bid was processed and created. False, otherwise. We should keep bidding.

    • restartRound

      public void restartRound() throws IllegalStateException
      A method for restarting the round after the bidding failed.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - Not everyone has bid yet. Not everyone passed.

    • startPlayingRound

      public void startPlayingRound() throws IllegalStateException
      A method for starting the playing of the new current round.
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - The bidding phase hasn't ended.

    • processCardPlay

      public void processCardPlay(String card)
      A method for processing the playing of a given card by the current player in the current trick.
      Parameters:
      card - The card played.

    • processAutonomousCardPlay

      public void processAutonomousCardPlay()
      A method for processing the autonomous playing of a card in the current trick.

    • evaluateAndAdvanceTrick

      public boolean evaluateAndAdvanceTrick()
      A method for evaluating the current trick as to who won. The player that won gets an extra trick won in the tricksWon map. The current trick advances to a new trick.
      Returns:
      True if all tricks have been played. False, otherwise.

    • processRoundOutcome

      public HashMap<Player,Integer> processRoundOutcome()
      A method for processing the outcome of this round.

    • requiresTrumpInput

      public static boolean requiresTrumpInput(BidType bidType)
      A method for finding whether a bid type requires extra input from the user.

    • registerLoneProposer

      public void registerLoneProposer(Player proposer)
      Processes the lone proposer to play a proposal alone bid.
      Parameters:
      proposer - The proposer to register.

    • getCurrentTrick

      public Trick getCurrentTrick()
      A getter for the current trick in this round.

    • isCurrentTrickOver

      public boolean isCurrentTrickOver()
      Returns true if the current trick is fully played.

    • getTricksLeft

      public int getTricksLeft()
      Returns the number of tricks left to be fully played in this round.

    • getTrumpSuit

      public Suit getTrumpSuit()
      A getter for the active trump suit in this round. Returns null if there is no active trump (e.g. Miserie, or Abondance before first card).

    • getLastDealtCard

      public Card getLastDealtCard()
      A getter for the last dealt card in this round.

    • getDealer

      public Player getDealer()
      A getter for the dealer.

    • getHighestBid

      public BidType getHighestBid()
      A getter for the highest bid so far.

    • getCardsInTrick

      public HashMap<Player,String> getCardsInTrick()
      A getter for the cards in this trick.

    • getCurrentBiddingPlayer

      public Player getCurrentBiddingPlayer()
      A getter for the current bidding player in this round. This player is the person that's supposed to bid next.

    • getCurrentBiddingPlayersCards

      public String[] getCurrentBiddingPlayersCards()
      A getter for the cards of the current player bidding.

    • getCurrentPlayingPlayersCards

      public String[] getCurrentPlayingPlayersCards()
      A getter for the cards of the current player, who is currently playing in the current trick.

    • getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer

      public String[] getAllowedCardsForCurrentPlayer()
      A method for finding which cards the current player is legally allowed to play.

    • getCurrentTrickWinnerName

      public String getCurrentTrickWinnerName()
      Returns the name of the player who would win the current trick based on cards played so far and the active trump suit.

    • getTrumpSuitName

      public String getTrumpSuitName()
      Returns the active trump suit name for display. Returns null if there is no active trump yet.

    • getOriginalTrumpSuitName

      public String getOriginalTrumpSuitName()
      Returns the original (deck-dealt) trump suit name for display. This never changes during the round.

    • getPossibleBids

      public BidType[] getPossibleBids()
      Finds the possible bids for the current bidding player.

      By GRASP Information Expert, we delegate the logic of determining which bids are still available to the BidType enum, since it knows the bid hierarchy. We only provide the context: what the current highest bid is, and whether a proposal has been made.

      Returns:
      An array of string representations of the available bids.

    • getCurrentPlayingPlayer

      public Player getCurrentPlayingPlayer()
      A getter for the current player playing in the current trick.

    • getActivePlayerName

      public String getActivePlayerName()
      A getter for the active player's name (either bidding or playing).

    • getOpenMiserieHands

      public HashMap<Player,String[]> getOpenMiserieHands(Player currentPlayer)
      A getter for the open miserie hands of the players other than the given player.

      This method dispatches to the Bid class.

    • getCardsFromPreviousTrick

      public LinkedHashMap<Player,String> getCardsFromPreviousTrick()
      A getter for finding the cards in the previous trick.
      Returns:
      The cards of the previous trick.

    • getLoneProposerName

      public String getLoneProposerName()
      Returns the string of the name of the lone proposer.
      Returns:
      The name of the proposer.

    • setHighestBid

      protected void setHighestBid(BidType highestBid)
      A setter for the highest bid in this round.

    • getExistingBids

      public String getExistingBids()
      Returns a string showing the bids already made by players this round.
      Returns:
      The string of the existing bids.
